series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains:1) Affirmative Action/Minority Business Enterprise Plans - Projected agency expenditures with minority business vendors; 2) Affirmative Action Plans - Analysis of agency employment practices, quantitatives, goals and objectives; 3) Equal Opportunity Minority Business Enterprise Statistical Reports - Quarterly reporting of expenditures with minority vendors; 4) Employee Demographic and Upward Mobility Reports - Report of total employee workforce by race, gender, and EEO job categories; 5) EEO Applicant Data Sheets - Race, gender, disability, and verteran status of applicants for employment; 6) EEO Exit Questionnaire Form - Voluntary questionnaire completed by exiting employees.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current, plus seven years. Current records are retained in HR/EEO office files and transferred to ODPS Record Center for retention., Paper: Shred
